name: Diving milestone check
description: Monthly check for Rescue at 40 dives, 9-month bucket-list stale, Nitrox overdue, rust, and other triggers in diver-milestones.md.

prompts.prompt:
READ .cursor/automations/diving-milestone-check.prompt.md FIRST — follow it exactly. Memory OFF.

Evaluate milestones (diver-milestones.md, divinglog.md, diver-status.md) per diver-milestone-reminders.mdc. Update reminder_state + evaluation log only if something fires. Do not git-commit.

TELEGRAM = fun dive-buddy digest, NOT an audit. BANNED in Telegram text: 'Diving milestones', 'No milestones due', 'Checked N logged dives', 'not yet due', 'reminder_state', 'evaluation log', 'diver-milestones.md', dense paragraphs.

Write digest to last-milestone-nudge.txt with BLANK LINES between sections. Required sections: opener + italic rotating line, 📊 Right now, 🎯 Level-up bar (use ▓░ progress), 📅 Next up, 🌊 Dream line, ✨ This month's move. Celebrate wins from their log. Then: bash scripts/validate-milestone-nudge.sh .cursor/automations/last-milestone-nudge.txt — if fail, rewrite; then bash scripts/send-telegram.sh --file .cursor/automations/last-milestone-nudge.txt

Copy energy from gold-standard example in the prompt file.
